description_long: This is a vintage gramophone-style record player featuring a large, ornate brass horn with floral engravings, mounted on a polished wooden base. The base is rectangular with curved edges and decorative molding, and it houses a visible winding handle and a brass control dial on the front. The turntable platter is black and circular, sitting atop the wooden base, and is accompanied by a metallic tonearm that extends over the platter. The horn is the most prominent feature, flaring outward with a scalloped edge and intricate patterns, giving the object a classic, antique appearance. The winding handle is wooden with a metal shaft, positioned on the side of the base. No modern electronic controls or dust cover are visible, emphasizing its historical design.
description: A vintage gramophone record player with a large, ornate brass horn, polished wooden base, and a black turntable platter. Features include a winding handle, brass control dial, and intricate floral engravings on the horn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face of the ornate brass horn with floral engravings and the wooden base with a brass control dial.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the flared horn, the black turntable platter, and the winding handle extending from the base.
description_view_2: Rear angled view focusing on the back of the horn, the turntable platter, and the wooden base's curved details.
description_view_3: Angled front view displaying the horn's interior, the tonearm over the platter, and the brass control dial on the base.
attribute_turntable_platter: The turntable platter is present, circular, and black, occupying a central position on the wooden base. It appears to be made of a hard material, likely metal or dense plastic, with a smooth, matte finish and visible concentric grooves typical of record platters. Its size is proportionate to the base, taking up about one-third of the top surface area. No additional markings or labels are visible.
attribute_tonearm: The tonearm is present, metallic, and slender, extending from the side of the base over the platter. It is medium in length, slightly curved, and appears to be made of brass or steel with a polished finish. The tonearm is positioned above the platter, suggesting it is ready for use, and features a visible joint near its base.
attribute_control_knobs: A single brass control dial is visible on the front of the wooden base, circular in shape and medium in size. It is set into a decorative brass plate, but no additional knobs, switches, or labeled buttons are present.
